description: Churn prevention: early signals, win-back campaigns, customer health scoring

items.name: Health Scoring (predict churn 60 days early)
items.signals: Usage -50%, support tickets up, engagement down, email opens 0%

items.name: Win-Back Sequences
items.tactic: Email: we miss you. Offer: special discount. Call: personalized. SMS: last-minute urgency. Recover 20-30%.

items.name: Exit Interview (learn why)
items.tactic: Exit survey: qué podríamos mejorar? Use feedback para otros clientes.
